title: Rivalry breaks records: Malaysia made Japan and South Korea compete to build twin towers and the results shocked everyone
summary_full: Malaysia's Petronas Twin Towers project saw an unusual dual-contractor approach, pitting Japanese and South Korean teams against each other. This unofficial race, fueled by national pride and tight deadlines, accelerated construction.  Despite engineering complexities, the parallel execution and competitive spirit delivered the iconic skyscrapers, briefly holding the world's tallest title and showcasing Asian engineering prowess.
